name: Tofu Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 Pita Breads, Split into Six Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place pita bread rounds on a cookie sheet and spread with tomato and garlic sauce.
3. Crumble the tofu over each pizza crust.
4. Top with green pepper and mushrooms.
5. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
